easy.title: Create Table and Insert
easy.description: Create memory DB, table `items(id, name)`, insert 1 row.
easy.solution:
import sqlite3
def setup_db():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute('CREATE TABLE items (id INT, name TEXT)')
    cur.execute('INSERT INTO items VALUES (?, ?)', (1, 'box'))
    conn.commit()
    cur.execute('SELECT * FROM items')
    res = cur.fetchall()
    conn.close()
    return res
